ddls:
CREATE TABLE "utilities" (
  "utility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each utility */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the water utility */,
  "area_served" TEXT /* Area served by the utility */,
  "population_served" INTEGER /* Population served by the utility */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the utility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the utility */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the utility */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the utility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contaminants" (
  "contaminant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detected contaminant */,
  "utility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the utility where the contaminant was detected */,
  "contaminant_name" TEXT /* Name of the contaminant */,
  "detection_date" TEXT /* Date when the contaminant was detected */,
  "level" REAL /* Level of the contaminant detected */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the contaminant level */,
  "sampling_point" TEXT /* Sampling point where the contaminant was detected */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used to detect the contaminant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contaminant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contaminants_utility_id FOREIGN KEY ("utility_id") REFERENCES utilities ("utility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each violation */,
  "utility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the utility that committed the violation */,
  "violation_type" TEXT /* Type of violation */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the violation was reported */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of the resolution for the violation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the violation */,
  "penalty_amount" REAL /* Penalty amount for the violation */,
  "penalty_paid" INTEGER /* Whether the penalty has been paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_violations_utility_id FOREIGN KEY ("utility_id") REFERENCES utilities ("utility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, compliance officer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "utility_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "utility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the utility where the staff member works */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_utility_staff_utility_id FOREIGN KEY ("utility_id") REFERENCES utilities ("utility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "utility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the utility the report is for */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_utility_id FOREIGN KEY ("utility_id") REFERENCES utilities ("utility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "utility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the utility taking the action */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the issue that prompted the action */,
  "action_plan" TEXT /* Plan of action to address the issue */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the action */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the action */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "completion_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of completion of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES violations ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES contaminants ("contaminant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_utility_id FOREIGN KEY ("utility_id") REFERENCES utilities ("utility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the action being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_updates_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "utility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the utility being notified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user being notified */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message contained in the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_utility_id FOREIGN KEY ("utility_id") REFERENCES utilities ("utility_id")
)
